name: Pasta with Fresh Tomato & Fresh Herbs
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 pounds Roma or other firm, ripe
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over moderate heat.
2. Add the garlic and, as soon as it sizzles, stir in the tomatoes and herbs.
3. Saute just until the tomatoes' juices thicken, 7 to 10 minutes.
4. Serve over cooked pasta.
